name: Frozen Device
description:
Summon an ancient portal, which arms after 1.5 seconds.

When triggered the enemy is teleported to you if within range, immobilized for 3 seconds, dealt 1799 Frost Damage, and afflicted with Major Maim, reducing their damage done by 10% for 4 seconds.

You can have up to 3 Frozen Devices active at a time.
